title: explicit machine style layer
manager: Introduce a real style layer — a stylesheet-like META surface — and stop baking visual defaults into the renderer, so appearance is data an author controls rather than hardcoded behavior. Separating style from structure is the precondition for themes existing at all; while defaults live in the engine, every theme is a fight against the renderer's opinions.
cs: folds fsl#1144 (remove style defaults for stylesheet)
